task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis and loaded the HIV.mdb dataset (Case table).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis window is open. The command log or data workspace shows the READ command for 'C:\EpiInfo7\Projects\HIV\HIV.mdb':Case, and the dataset variables appear in the variable list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the output route to the required HTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command log shows a ROUTEOUT command specifying 'C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_analysis.html', or a dialog box is visible configuring this exact output file path.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent executed FREQ and MEANS analyses on the required variables (transmission category, age group, sex, race/ethnicity, CD4 count/AIDS indicators).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command log or output window displays FREQ and MEANS commands for the specified demographic and transmission variables, with corresponding statistical tables generated in the output view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent executed cross-tabulations (TABLES) of transmission categories against outcome indicators.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command log shows a TABLES command (e.g., transmission category by AIDS indicator) and the resulting 2x2 or NxN cross-tabulation tables are visible in the output window.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent performed stratified analysis using the SELECT command for specific demographic subgroups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command log shows a SELECT statement (e.g., filtering by a specific age group or sex) followed by subsequent analysis commands, indicating the data was stratified.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent exported the cross-tabulation summary to the required CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command log shows a WRITE command exporting data to 'C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_summary.csv', or a file explorer/save dialog confirms the creation of this specific CSV file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distinct Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis GUI (with the command tree on the left, output window on the right, and command log at the bottom) must be visible, rather than a generic text editor or mock script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed the commands to generate the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output window shows generated HTML tables and statistics corresponding to the commands. The agent did not just type commands into a text file without running them.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the files to the exact requested paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ROUTEOUT and WRITE commands or save dialogs explicitly show the exact paths 'C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_analysis.html' and 'C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_summary.csv', not generic or default directories.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. The agent should load 'C:\EpiInfo7\Projects\HIV\HIV.mdb' (table: Case) using the READ command. The analysis requires using FREQ (frequencies), MEANS (means), TABLES (cross-tabulations), and SELECT (stratified analysis/filtering) commands. The results must be routed to 'C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_analysis.html' (using ROUTEOUT) and exported to 'C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_summary.csv' (using WRITE). Look for these specific commands in the Epi Info command log or program editor.
